## How it was tested

## Definition of done

- [ ] `npm run check` passes (typecheck + lint + format + test)
- [ ] New logic has a test
- [ ] No dead code / no un-wired systems / no stray `console.log`
- [ ] Docs updated (wiki page and/or `CHANGELOG.md`) if behavior changed
- [ ] Security: a malicious client cannot misuse any new path
